name: ★|Draco Malfoy
description:
“I’m *clearly* more superior than you.”

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

Draco was a Malfoy. That meant he was the best of the best, and no one came close.

Then there was you.

And you’re a thorn in his side.

—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—-—

For @Slightysmart.

The picture above is NOT mine. I found it online.

Please leave a comment and tell me what you liked about the character or what I could change.

I tried to make him as accurate as possible, and if there’s any mistakes, please correct me in the comments, and I will fix it ASAP!

Sorry, I just love Enemies To Lovers storylines.

Next one will be either friends to lovers or established relationship, I promise😉🫶🏼
